SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister
Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem

Interface FeatureRegistrar

All Known Implementing Classes:
SlashCommandRegistrar, SubCommandRegistrar, TaskRegistrar
public interface FeatureRegistrar
Common interface for all command and logic registration modules.

A FeatureRegistrar acts as a bridge between the central AnnotationScanner and specific Discord functionalities (e.g., Slash Commands, Subcommands, Tasks). It is responsible for parsing relevant metadata from the classpath and managing the lifecycle of these components.

* Implementation Note: All implementations should ensure thread-safety for internal caches and handle proper cleanup within the shutdown(JDA) method.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<net.dv8tion.jda.api.interactions.commands.build.SlashCommandData>
    getCommands()

    void
    shutdown(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda)
    Gracefully shuts down the feature and releases all occupied resources.

  • Method Details

    • register

      void register(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda, org.reflections.Reflections reflections)
      Initializes the feature and registers it within the JDA ecosystem.

      This method is typically called once during the bot's startup sequence. Implementations should use the provided Reflections object to find specific annotations and map them to executable logic.

      Parameters:
      jda - The active JDA instance used for Discord API interaction.
      reflections - The pre-initialized reflection metadata containing the scanned classpath.

    • shutdown

      void shutdown(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda)
      Gracefully shuts down the feature and releases all occupied resources.

      This method must be used to:

      • Remove attached EventListeners.
      • Stop running background threads or Executors.
      • Clear internal reflection or instance caches to aid Garbage Collection.

      Parameters:
      jda - The JDA instance to detach listeners from.

    • getCommands

      default List<net.dv8tion.jda.api.interactions.commands.build.SlashCommandData> getCommands()
